info.title: Dorfkönig News API
info.description:
Public, read-only endpoint for fetching confirmed Bajour village newsletter drafts.

Returns drafts grouped by village within a configurable date range, for CMS and newsletter-platform integration (WePublish overview, Mailchimp, etc.).

See the prose documentation at [`../news-api.md`](../news-api.md) for lifecycle, verification workflow, and usage examples.

get.description: Returns all 10 Basel-area villages as keys. Villages without confirmed drafts in the requested date range return an empty array. Only drafts with `verification_status = 'bestätigt'` are included. Results sorted by `publication_date` descending.

parameters.name: auth
parameters.description:
Shared secret token. Alternative to the `Authorization: Bearer` header. Not required if the header is set.

**Security note:** query-param auth lands in upstream access logs. Prefer the `Authorization` header in production.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Center date for the range query (UTC). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Symmetric range in days around `date`. The response includes drafts with `publication_date` between `date - range` and `date + range` inclusive. Values above 30 are silently clamped to 30; negative values are clamped to 0.

200.description: Drafts grouped by village. All 10 villages are always present as keys.

items: Die Gemeindeversammlung hat den Budget-Antrag abgelehnt.

riehen.draft:
## Gemeinderat
Der Gemeinderat hat den Neubau genehmigt...
items: Der Gemeinderat hat den Neubau am Bahnhof genehmigt.
Die Hauptstrasse wird nächste Woche gesperrt.

400.description: `VALIDATION_ERROR` — the `date` parameter is not a valid `YYYY-MM-DD` date.

401.description: `UNAUTHORIZED` — missing token or token does not match the configured shared secret.

405.description: Method not allowed — only `GET` is supported. Note: the function uses the shared `errorResponse()` helper, whose default code mapping falls through to `INTERNAL_ERROR` for status 405.

500.description: `INTERNAL_ERROR` — server misconfiguration (`NEWS_API_TOKEN` unset) or database error.

options.description: Returns CORS headers. Always allowed from any origin.

schema.example: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS

newsApiKeyQuery.name: auth
newsApiKeyQuery.description: Shared secret passed as a query parameter. Convenient for browsers and static consumers, but leaks to access logs. Prefer `newsApiBearer` in production.

newsApiBearer.description: Shared secret passed as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Recommended for server-to-server callers.

Draft.description: A single confirmed village newsletter draft.

publication_date.description: The date the draft is intended for (`YYYY-MM-DD`).

draft.description: Newsletter body in Markdown. Contains headings, paragraphs, and source citations.
draft.example:
## Gemeinderat
Der Gemeinderat hat den Neubau genehmigt...

items.description: Individual verified statements (information units) used to generate the draft.
example: Der Gemeinderat hat den Neubau am Bahnhof genehmigt.
Die Hauptstrasse wird nächste Woche gesperrt.

VillageDrafts.description: Confirmed drafts for a single village, sorted by `publication_date` descending.

data.description: Map of village ID → array of drafts. All 10 currently-covered villages appear as keys, with `[]` when no confirmed drafts fall in the range. The map is **open** — village IDs are iterated from the backend's canonical list, so new villages can be added without a spec bump. Current IDs: `aesch`, `allschwil`, `arlesheim`, `binningen`, `bottmingen`, `muenchenstein`, `muttenz`, `pratteln`, `reinach`, `riehen`.

ErrorResponse.description: Error envelope returned by the function itself. Note that the Supabase platform router emits a different flat shape (`{code, message}`) for router-level 404s; that is not produced by this function and is not part of this contract.
